sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Arcadius</hi> Grammaticus [Arc.] <date TEIform="date">iv A.D. (?)</date> Ed. E. H. Barker, Leipzig 1820; ed. M. Schmidt, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐπιτομὴ τῆς καθολικῆς προσῳδίας Ἡρωδιανοῦ,</foreign> Jena 1860: cited by Barker's page, given in Schmidt's margin.</item>
